evals.name: initial-setup-configuration
evals.prompt: Configure the agentic office for me. I am starting fresh and need to set up my workplace memory from scratch.
evals.expected_output: A guided setup that creates work.local.md from the template, walks through all four layers (Personal, Team, Projects, Organisational) interactively, delivers the two-plugin architecture orientation, and asks about domain agent integrations.
expectations: Setup creates work.local.md from the bundled template at ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/work.local.md.template

Guided configuration walks through all four layers: Personal (name, role, working style), Team (5-8 people), Projects (active projects with status), Organisational (terminology, recurring meetings, unwritten rules)
Orientation message explains the two-plugin architecture: official productivity plugin (task CRUD, memory, dashboard) and agentic office plugin (9 professional intelligence skills + 4 agents)
Setup asks about domain agent integrations from other chapters (finance, sales, HR, operations, supply chain)

evals.name: orientation-existing-setup
evals.prompt: I already have a work.local.md file but I have forgotten how the agentic office works. Give me the orientation again and explain what skills and agents are available.
evals.expected_output: Since work.local.md already exists, skip creation and go directly to the orientation message explaining the two-plugin architecture, listing all 9 skills and 4 agents, and suggesting try-it prompts.
expectations: Setup detects existing work.local.md and skips to STEP 4 (orientation only) — does not overwrite without asking
Orientation explains the distinction between the official productivity plugin and the agentic office plugin
All 9 professional intelligence skills are listed with brief descriptions
All 4 persistent agents are listed with their roles

evals.name: negative-should-use-workplace-context
evals.prompt: Add a new person to my workplace memory. Her name is Fatima Khan, she is the new Head of Legal, and she prefers written communication.
evals.expected_output: This query should be handled by workplace-context, not setup. Adding a person entry to work.local.md is a workplace-context function.
expectations: This query is about adding a person entry to workplace memory — it matches workplace-context triggers (add person, workplace memory)
Setup handles initial configuration and orientation, not ongoing memory maintenance

evals.name: negative-should-use-productivity-start
evals.prompt: Initialise my TASKS.md and CLAUDE.md files for the productivity dashboard. I want the basic task management setup.
evals.expected_output: This query should be handled by the official productivity plugin's /productivity:start, not agentic-office setup. TASKS.md and dashboard initialisation is the official plugin's responsibility.
expectations: This query is about the official productivity plugin's setup — it matches /productivity:start (initialise TASKS.md + CLAUDE.md + dashboard)
Agentic office setup handles work.local.md creation and two-plugin orientation, not TASKS.md initialisation
